# MDE v1.5.14

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed renderer reload behavior when multiple MDE windows are open. Reloading one window now restores that window's previous workspace and opened Markdown file instead of jumping to the workspace most recently opened by another window.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added per-window workspace session storage for renderer reloads while preserving the existing global recent-workspace and active-workspace behavior for new windows.
- Added unit coverage for workspace session storage validation and app startup restore precedence.
- Added integration coverage that guards the renderer startup contract so per-window session restore is checked before global active workspace restore.
- Added E2E coverage for reloading a window after another workspace has been written as the shared active workspace.
- Stabilized the idle-autosave E2E assertion so it observes the editor selection without changing the contenteditable focus target.

## Documentation

- Updated the Chinese workspace manual to document that refreshing one MDE window keeps its own workspace and opened Markdown file when multiple windows are open.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `node scripts/run-editor-performance-e2e.mjs smoke`
- Focused unit, integration, and E2E verification for per-window workspace reload restoration.

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow.
- Windows NSIS artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow when the Windows release job is enabled.
